subcodes.first_line: O friends of Truth and lovers divine! In all conditions and at all times ye are mentioned in the assemblage of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حق و دوستان الهی در کل احوال و جمیع احیان در انجمن رحمن مذکور و
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
